      "title": "Transformer Architecture",
      "body": "The transformer replaces recurrence with [[self-attention]], enabling parallel processing of sequences. Introduced by Vaswani et al., 2017."
    },
    {
      "slug": "self-attention",
      "page_type": "concept",
      "title": "Self-Attention",
      "body": "Self-attention lets every position in a sequence attend to every other position, replacing recurrence."
    }
  ]
}
